table.description: Standard data table for maritime lists (crew, alerts, vessels).

structure.card: flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-slate-800/50 p-4 border border-white/5
structure.label: text-xs font-medium text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider

structure.itemContainer: flex items-start gap-3 rounded-lg border p-3
structure.title: text-sm font-semibold

card.description: Generic data card with flex layout.

structure.row: flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg bg-slate-800/40 px-4 py-3 border border-white/5
structure.label: text-sm text-slate-400

list.description: Vertical list of items (e.g. crew roster, tasks).

structure.item: flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg bg-slate-950/50 border border-white/5 px-4 py-3
structure.badge: rounded-full px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-medium bg-slate-800 text-slate-300

gauge.description: Tank/engine gauges with vertical fill bars, horizontal progress, and sparklines.

structure.verticalGauge: h-36 w-16 rounded-lg border bg-slate-900/80 flex flex-col justify-end
structure.sparkline: inline SVG path for consumption trend

route-map.description: Voyage route map with SVG path, port markers, vessel position, leg timeline.

structure.svg: viewBox chart with ocean gradient, land masses, route path
structure.vesselMarker: triangle at progress% along bezier path

wind-rose.description: Polar wind rose — directional sectors with speed/frequency rings.

structure.container: flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl border bg-slate-950/70 p-4
structure.svg: polar chart with 16 compass sectors, concentric speed rings
structure.legend: Beaufort scale color key below chart

weather-map.description: Route-corridor weather overlay on mini nautical chart.

structure.layers: wind arrows, wave height contours, swell direction

heatmap.description: Matrix heatmap for sea state, fleet metrics, or incident density.

structure.grid: CSS grid cells with color scale from emerald to rose

area-chart.description: Stacked or single area chart for temporal trends.

structure.svg: area path with gradient fill, axis labels
structure.crosshair: hover vertical line with value tooltip

timeline.description: Chronological event or voyage leg timeline.

structure.content: rounded-lg border bg-slate-900/60 px-3 py-2 text-sm

circular-progress.description: SVG ring gauge for tank fill or voyage completion.

bullet-chart.description: Compact bullet chart — actual bar vs target with qualitative ranges.

sparkline.description: Inline SVG sparkline for sensor streams and KPI trends.

structure.path: SVG polyline with gradient area fill

grade-indicator.description: CII/emissions letter grade badge (A–E) with color coding.

structure.badge: large letter grade rounded-xl font-bold text-4xl
structure.scale: horizontal A–E scale with current position marker

carbon-gauge.description: Carbon intensity gauge with IMO threshold bands.

severity-chart.description: Horizontal bar chart of alert counts by severity level.

structure.filter: click bar to filter alert stream

bubble-chart.description: Fleet bubble chart — x/y position with bubble size encoding third metric.

structure.svg: scatter plot with sized circles per vessel
